task_goal: Create a validated Task Execution Pack for a downstream coding agent.
non_goals: Do not execute user business code.
Do not replace Jira or Linear.
context_contracts: Use implementation instructions and package manifests as source of truth.
Treat Markdown as review view unless it conflicts with JSON.
workflow_steps: Clarify facts, assumptions, open questions, and blocking questions.
Run Clarification Council Loop and capture user-confirmed understanding.
Create requirement model from confirmed clarification facts.
Create Agile value plan with stories, AC, INVEST, MVP, increment, and eval cases.
Create execution, tool, eval, and recovery contracts.
Package artifacts and run release gate.
sandbox_rules: Write only inside the requested task pack directory.
Do not execute user business code.
acceptance_criteria: Recovery paths and trace requirements are non-empty.
Tool contracts include side effects, permissions, failure modes, retry policy, rollback policy, and audit evidence.
trace_requirements: Record evaluator status and release recommendation.
regression_cases: Missing clarification session fixture must block.
Missing requirement model fixture must block.
Missing agile plan fixture must block.
Missing tool contract fixture must block.
Blocking open question fixture must block.
Missing recovery path fixture must block.
Markdown manifest conflict fixture must block.
